case_title: RURUP, KARII LEE VS ROUMILA, TAYEB

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,525.00 FILED BY RURUP, KARII LEE AS TO DEFENDANT ROUMILA, TAYEB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FILED BY DEFENDANT ROUMILA, TAYEB
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT ROUMILA, TAYEB
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROUMILA, TAYEB
FUNDS REFERRED TO IN ESCHEATMENT NOTICE HAVE BEEN ESCHEATED TO THE COURT'S OPERATION FUND - EFFECTIVE APRIL 23, 2013

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RURUP, KARII LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROUMILA, TAYEB $1,335.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,367.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ORDER DEFT'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS " DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE";PAYMENT DOES NOT INCLUDE COSTS OF $32.00; PRINCIPAL PAYMENT IS 'PARTIAL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT'; DEFT MAY RENEW REQUEST WITH EITHER PROOF OF BALANCE OR A DECLARATION FROM PLTFF THAT DEFT'S PAYMENT WAS ACCEPTED IN FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
